rulings.Case Title: JOSE MERINO VS. SAXON MORTGAGE, INC. et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Amended Notice Of Demurrer To 1st Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, September 5, 2012, line 1. DEFENDANTS SAXON MORTGAGE, INC. and MORGAN STANLEY CAPITAL SERVICES, INC.'s Demurrer to the first amended complaint. Sustain with leave to amend. Opposing party failed to comply with San Francisco Local Rule 2.6B and Court's August 13, 2012 order. = (501/REQ)
